primary_text:
I started FarmThru because my kids deserved better than mystery meat in plastic.

I wanted to know the farmer. I wanted to see the paddock. I wanted food raised properly, not pushed through a system that prioritises shelf life over quality.

Now 2,000+ families shop with us. 50+ regenerative farms. A hub where you collect food that was on the farm days ago.

In July 2026, we're opening equity crowdfunding on Birchal. From $50. If this matters to you, be part of it.

Not financial advice.
headline: My kids deserved better food
description: Co-founder story. Equity crowdfunding on Birchal, July 2026. From $50.
creative_brief: Intimate family kitchen moment. Parent and child cooking together with recognisable FarmThru produce. Warm, documentary. Not staged.
